element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Starting weapon, baseline for all encounters
Medium-range bullets in three directions; obtained through item drops
Two per stage must be destroyed to unlock path to boss section; core progression mechanic
Two transporters per section; some require conditions; choosing wrongly can lead to backtracking
Wider v-shaped laser beams; higher damage output
Combines Flash Buster and Megasmasher capabilities; wider long-range shots in three directions
Mega Missile, Flash Bomb, Crush Ball; activated by pressing both buttons; costs 4 energy per use
One per stage finale; requires power generator destruction to reach

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Exploration-driven tension with choice-induced uncertainty. Rhythmic spikes at transporter junctions and boss encounters. Energy management creates sustained low-level tension throughout.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Alternate transporter paths lead to branching sections; non-critical sections are optional
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Conditional transporters reward thorough exploration and power generator destruction before access granted

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to transporter mechanics and basic weapon upgrades in Stage 1 (Sections 00-19); player learns progression path and choice consequences
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stage 2 (Sections 20-39) introduces more complex enemy patterns and conditional barriers; requires strategic power generator acquisition
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 3 (Sections 40-59) features Mega Buster availability and advanced special shells; culminates in final boss
notable_spikes: First transporter choice junction at Section 00
Power generator locations requiring route planning

notable_level_patterns.description: End of each section presents two transporter choices. Some lead backward, creating optional loops. Conditional transporters block access until power generators destroyed, forcing exploration order.
Two generators per stage hidden across different sections. Must be destroyed to unlock final boss section. Creates exploration mandate and route decisions.
Sections 19, 39, 59 serve as stage finales. Access locked until both stage generators destroyed. Clean spatial gating mechanism.
Health mechanic uses cumulative energy depletion rather than discrete lives. Allows continuation at section start if energy remains. Creates tension around resource management.
